original_prompt:
Spawn 3 parallel subagents to fix these issues simultaneously. No tests. Each commits and pushes independently.

Subagent 1 - REGEX FIX:
In src/feeds.js, pre-compile all regex patterns at module initialization instead of inside the categorizeArticle function loop. The regex patterns from CATEGORY_KEYWORDS should be compiled once at startup and reused. Commit and push: "Perf: pre-compile regex patterns"

Subagent 2 - ABORT FIX:
In src/routes.js, find the translation loop that checks abortContr...
